nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives full form payload from merchant-form.html on submit

nodes.name: Get Lead
nodes.notes: Fetches lead record to get Dropbox Folder Path for file uploads

nodes.name: Build Fields
nodes.notes: Builds the Airtable fields object from the webhook body. Encrypted fields intentionally excluded.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body;
return [{
  json: {
    recordId: body.leadId,
    fields: {
      'Status': 'Form Received',
      'Form Received Date': new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
      'Legal Name':    body.legal_name        || '',
      'DBA Name':      body.dba_name          || '',
      'Contact First': body.contact_first     || '',
      'Contact Last':  body.contact_last      || '',
      'Contact Suffix':body.contact_suffix    || '',
      'Contact Phone': body.contact_phone     || '',
      'Contact Email': body.contact_email     || '',
      'Legal Address': body.legal_address_line1 || '',
      'Legal City':    body.legal_city        || '',
      'Legal State':   body.legal_state       || '',
      'Legal Zip':     body.legal_zip         || '',
      'DBA Address':   body.dba_address_line1 || '',
      'DBA City':      body.dba_city          || '',
      'DBA State':     body.dba_state         || '',
      'DBA Zip':       body.dba_zip           || '',
      'DBA Phone':     body.dba_phone         || '',
      'Business Type': body.business_type     || '',
      'Products Services': body.products_services || ''
    }
  }
}];

nodes.name: Update Lead
nodes.notes: PATCHes the lead record in Airtable with all form fields. Uses HTTP Request to guarantee field mapping works on import.

nodes.name: Respond
nodes.notes: Responds immediately so the form doesn't time out. File saves continue in parallel after.

nodes.name: Prepare Files
nodes.notes: Converts non-empty base64 file payloads into binary items for Dropbox upload. Skips any file with no data.

nodes.name: Upload Files
nodes.notes: Uploads each document to the lead's Dropbox folder. Runs once per file item from Prepare Files.

nodes.name: Prepare Application Data
nodes.notes: Saves all non-encrypted form fields as application-data.json to Dropbox. Open with decrypt-tool.html to view the full application.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body;
const leadData = $('Get Lead').first().json;
const folderPath = (leadData.fields ? leadData.fields['Dropbox Folder Path'] : leadData['Dropbox Folder Path']) || '_CoCard/_Leads/unknown';

const appData = {
  leadId: body.leadId,
  submitted: new Date().toISOString(),
  legal_name: body.legal_name,
  dba_name: body.dba_name,
  contact_first: body.contact_first,
  contact_last: body.contact_last,
  contact_suffix: body.contact_suffix,
  contact_phone: body.contact_phone,
  contact_email: body.contact_email,
  legal_address_line1: body.legal_address_line1,
  legal_city: body.legal_city,
  legal_state: body.legal_state,
  legal_zip: body.legal_zip,
  dba_address_line1: body.dba_address_line1,
  dba_city: body.dba_city,
  dba_state: body.dba_state,
  dba_zip: body.dba_zip,
  dba_phone: body.dba_phone,
  business_type: body.business_type,
  state_incorporated: body.state_incorporated,
  incorporated_date: body.incorporated_date,
  products_services: body.products_services,
  refund_policy: body.refund_policy,
  owner1_first: body.owner1_first,
  owner1_last: body.owner1_last,
  owner1_suffix: body.owner1_suffix,
  owner1_address_line1: body.owner1_address_line1,
  owner1_city: body.owner1_city,
  owner1_state: body.owner1_state,
  owner1_zip: body.owner1_zip,
  owner1_phone: body.owner1_phone,
  owner1_citizenship: body.owner1_citizenship,
  owner1_title: body.owner1_title,
  owner1_percent: body.owner1_percent,
  has_additional_owners: body.has_additional_owners,
  owner2_first: body.owner2_first,
  owner2_last: body.owner2_last,
  owner2_suffix: body.owner2_suffix,
  owner2_address_line1: body.owner2_address_line1,
  owner2_city: body.owner2_city,
  owner2_state: body.owner2_state,
  owner2_zip: body.owner2_zip,
  owner2_phone: body.owner2_phone,
  owner2_citizenship: body.owner2_citizenship,
  owner2_title: body.owner2_title,
  owner2_percent: body.owner2_percent,
  owner3_first: body.owner3_first,
  owner3_last: body.owner3_last,
  owner3_suffix: body.owner3_suffix,
  owner3_address_line1: body.owner3_address_line1,
  owner3_city: body.owner3_city,
  owner3_state: body.owner3_state,
  owner3_zip: body.owner3_zip,
  owner3_phone: body.owner3_phone,
  owner3_citizenship: body.owner3_citizenship,
  owner3_title: body.owner3_title,
  owner3_percent: body.owner3_percent,
  owns_inventory: body.owns_inventory,
  inventory_on_site: body.inventory_on_site,
  customer_charged_when: body.customer_charged_when,
  uses_fulfillment_house: body.uses_fulfillment_house,
  delivery_1to7_pct: body.delivery_1to7_pct,
  delivery_8to14_pct: body.delivery_8to14_pct,
  delivery_14plus_pct: body.delivery_14plus_pct,
  b2b_pct: body.b2b_pct,
  public_pct: body.public_pct,
  monthly_cc_sales: body.monthly_cc_sales,
  avg_cc_transaction: body.avg_cc_transaction,
  transactions_per_month: body.transactions_per_month,
  ach_requested: body.ach_requested,
  monthly_check_sales: body.monthly_check_sales,
  checks_per_month: body.checks_per_month,
  avg_check_amount: body.avg_check_amount,
  max_check_amount: body.max_check_amount
};

const buffer = Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(appData, null, 2), 'utf8');
const binary = await this.helpers.prepareBinaryData(buffer, 'application-data.json', 'application/json');

return [{
  json: { dropboxPath: ('/' + folderPath + '/application-data.json').replace('//', '/') },
  binary: { data: binary }
}];

nodes.name: Upload Application Data
nodes.notes: Saves application-data.json to the lead's Dropbox folder. Open with decrypt-tool.html to view full application.

nodes.name: Prepare Sensitive Data
nodes.notes: Packages encrypted EIN, DOBs, and SSNs into sensitive-data.json for Dropbox. Values remain encrypted — decryption happens locally via decrypt-tool.html.

nodes.name: Upload Sensitive Data
nodes.notes: Saves sensitive-data.json (encrypted EIN/DOBs/SSNs) to the lead's Dropbox folder. Open with decrypt-tool.html to decrypt.
